requirement_topic.en: EMC Requirements — SASO EMC Technical Regulation / CISPR Standards
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容要求——SASO电磁兼容技术法规 / CISPR标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容要求——SASO電磁相容技術法規 / CISPR標準

summary.en: Saudi Arabia, through SASO, has issued EMC technical regulations that reference CISPR (International Special Committee on Radio Interference) standards for electromagnetic emissions and IEC 61000 series standards for immunity. SASO adopts GSO technical regulations for EMC where GCC-harmonised standards exist, and may reference CISPR 11 (Industrial, Scientific and Medical equipment — radio-frequency disturbance characteristics) for EV charging equipment classified as industrial electrical apparatus. Products subject to SASO mandatory EMC regulations require a SABER PCoC demonstrating conformity with the applicable CISPR/IEC 61000 standards. [NOTE: The specific SASO/GSO EMC technical regulation number applicable to EV charging equipment as power electronics / industrial electrical apparatus, and the current edition of CISPR standards referenced, should be verified directly with SASO or on the SABER platform — SASO has periodically updated its EMC regulations and product scope. The 60 Hz grid in Saudi Arabia means that harmonic emissions test results (IEC 61000-3-2) performed at 50 Hz may not be directly applicable; confirm 60 Hz test requirements with the SASO-approved conformity assessment body.]
summary.zh: 沙特阿拉伯通过SASO颁布了电磁兼容技术法规，引用CISPR（无线电干扰特别国际委员会）标准规范电磁发射，引用IEC 61000系列标准规范抗扰度。SASO在有GCC协调标准的情况下采用GSO技术法规，并可能将CISPR 11（工业、科学和医疗设备无线电骚扰特性）适用于被列为工业电气设备的电动汽车充电设备。受SASO强制EMC法规约束的产品须取得SABER PCoC，证明符合适用的CISPR/IEC 61000标准。【注：适用于电动汽车充电设备（作为电力电子/工业电气设备）的具体SASO/GSO EMC技术法规编号及其引用的CISPR标准当前版本，应直接向SASO核实或在SABER平台确认——SASO已定期更新其EMC法规和产品范围。沙特阿拉伯的60Hz电网意味着在50Hz条件下进行的谐波发射测试结果（IEC 61000-3-2）可能不能直接适用；请向SASO认可的合格评定机构确认60Hz测试要求。】
summary.zht: 沙特阿拉伯通過SASO頒布了電磁相容技術法規，引用CISPR（無線電干擾特別國際委員會）標準規範電磁發射，引用IEC 61000系列標準規範抗擾度。SASO在有GCC協調標準的情況下採用GSO技術法規，並可能將CISPR 11（工業、科學和醫療設備無線電騷擾特性）適用於被列為工業電氣設備的電動汽車充電設備。受SASO強制EMC法規約束的產品須取得SABER PCoC，證明符合適用的CISPR/IEC 61000標準。【注：適用於電動汽車充電設備（作為電力電子/工業電氣設備）的具體SASO/GSO EMC技術法規編號及其引用的CISPR標準當前版本，應直接向SASO核實或在SABER平台確認——SASO已定期更新其EMC法規和產品範圍。沙特阿拉伯的60Hz電網意味著在50Hz條件下進行的諧波發射測試結果（IEC 61000-3-2）可能不能直接適用；請向SASO認可的合格評定機構確認60Hz測試要求。】

standards_or_laws: CISPR 11 — Industrial, scientific and medical equipment — Radio-frequency disturbance characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (applicable to EV charging equipment as power electronics)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment input current ≤ 16 A per phase)
IEC 61000-3-3 — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker
IEC 61000-4 series — EMC immunity test standards
SASO EMC Technical Regulation (verify current regulation number and edition on saber.sa)
GSO EMC standards as adopted by SASO (where applicable)

summary.en: China's EMC framework for EV charging equipment includes: GB/T 18487.2-2017 (EMC requirements for AC and DC EV supply equipment — recommended, based on IEC 61851-21-2:2015); GB 4824-2019 (mandatory, based on CISPR 11:2015 — ISM equipment radio-frequency disturbance); GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory, harmonic emissions, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020); and GB/T 17799.4-2022 (mandatory, generic industrial emissions, IDT IEC 61000-6-4:2018). All Chinese EMC test reports are issued at 50 Hz; the 60 Hz Saudi grid introduces additional complexity in re-applying Chinese test data. CCC EMC certification is not accepted by SASO.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备EMC框架包括：GB/T 18487.2-2017（交直流电动汽车供电设备EMC要求——推荐性，基于IEC 61851-21-2:2015）；GB 4824-2019（强制性，基于CISPR 11:2015——工业、科学和医疗设备无线电骚扰）；GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，谐波发射，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）；以及GB/T 17799.4-2022（强制性，通用工业发射，等同IEC 61000-6-4:2018）。所有中国EMC检测报告均在50Hz条件下出具；60Hz沙特电网在复用中国测试数据时引入额外复杂性。CCC EMC认证不被SASO接受。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備EMC框架包括：GB/T 18487.2-2017（交直流電動汽車供電設備EMC要求——推薦性，基於IEC 61851-21-2:2015）；GB 4824-2019（強制性，基於CISPR 11:2015——工業、科學和醫療設備無線電騷擾）；GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，諧波發射，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）；以及GB/T 17799.4-2022（強制性，通用工業發射，等同IEC 61000-6-4:2018）。所有中國EMC檢測報告均在50Hz條件下出具；60Hz沙特電網在複用中國測試數據時引入額外複雜性。CCC EMC認證不被SASO接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.2-2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 2: EMC requirements (recommended, based on IEC 61851-21-2:2015)
GB 4824-2019 — Industrial, scientific and medical equipment — Radio-frequency disturbance characteristics (mandatory, based on CISPR 11:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)
GB/T 17799.4-2022 — Generic industrial emission standard (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-6-4:2018)

gap.en: Three gaps exist for Chinese EV charger manufacturers targeting Saudi Arabia: (1) Certification body — SASO requires conformity assessment by a SASO-approved body for SABER PCoC; Chinese CNAS EMC test reports and CCC certification are not accepted; fresh testing to CISPR 11 / IEC 61000 series by a SASO-approved or internationally accredited laboratory is required; (2) Frequency — All Chinese EMC tests are performed at 50 Hz; Saudi Arabia's 60 Hz grid may require fresh EMC testing at 60 Hz, particularly for harmonic emission tests (IEC 61000-3-2) and conducted emission measurements where switching-frequency harmonics interact with grid frequency; confirm 60 Hz test scope with the SASO-approved conformity assessment body; (3) Standard edition — GB 4824-2019 is based on CISPR 11:2015; if SASO references a later CISPR 11 edition, a new test report citing the current SASO-referenced edition will be required.
gap.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备制造商进军沙特市场面临三项差距：（1）认证机构——SASO要求由SASO认可的机构进行合格评定以取得SABER PCoC；中国CNAS EMC检测报告及CCC认证不被接受；须由SASO认可或国际认可实验室重新依据CISPR 11 / IEC 61000系列进行测试；（2）频率——所有中国EMC测试均在50Hz条件下进行；沙特阿拉伯的60Hz电网可能要求在60Hz条件下重新进行EMC测试，特别是谐波发射测试（IEC 61000-3-2）及开关频率谐波与电网频率相互作用的传导发射测量；请向SASO认可的合格评定机构确认60Hz测试范围；（3）标准版本——GB 4824-2019基于CISPR 11:2015；若SASO引用更新版CISPR 11，则需要出具引用SASO当前引用版本的新检测报告。
gap.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備製造商進軍沙特市場面臨三項差距：（1）認證機構——SASO要求由SASO認可的機構進行合格評定以取得SABER PCoC；中國CNAS EMC檢測報告及CCC認證不被接受；須由SASO認可或國際認可實驗室重新依據CISPR 11 / IEC 61000系列進行測試；（2）頻率——所有中國EMC測試均在50Hz條件下進行；沙特阿拉伯的60Hz電網可能要求在60Hz條件下重新進行EMC測試，特別是諧波發射測試（IEC 61000-3-2）及開關頻率諧波與電網頻率相互作用的傳導發射測量；請向SASO認可的合格評定機構確認60Hz測試範圍；（3）標準版本——GB 4824-2019基於CISPR 11:2015；若SASO引用更新版CISPR 11，則需要出具引用SASO當前引用版本的新檢測報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SASO EMC technical regulation requires CISPR/IEC 61000 compliance and SABER PCoC for applicable electrical products including EV charging equipment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (GB 4824, GB 17625.1, GB/T 17799.4 are mandatory national standards); GB/T 18487.2-2017 is recommended but applied in CCC/certification schemes

source.publisher: SASO — Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese EV charger EMC certification (CCC / CNAS reports) is not accepted by SASO. Fresh EMC testing by a SASO-approved conformity assessment body, to CISPR 11 and applicable IEC 61000 series, is required for SABER PCoC. The 60 Hz Saudi grid introduces a significant test condition difference from Chinese 50 Hz test norms — manufacturers should confirm whether 60 Hz-specific EMC testing is required with the conformity assessment body before planning the test campaign.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电动汽车充电设备EMC认证（CCC / CNAS报告）不被SASO接受。须由SASO认可的合格评定机构按CISPR 11及适用的IEC 61000系列重新进行EMC测试，以取得SABER PCoC。沙特阿拉伯的60Hz电网与中国50Hz测试规范存在显著测试条件差异——制造商在规划测试活动前，应向合格评定机构确认是否需要进行60Hz专项EMC测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電動汽車充電設備EMC認證（CCC / CNAS報告）不被SASO接受。須由SASO認可的合格評定機構按CISPR 11及適用的IEC 61000系列重新進行EMC測試，以取得SABER PCoC。沙特阿拉伯的60Hz電網與中國50Hz測試規範存在顯著測試條件差異——製造商在規劃測試活動前，應向合格評定機構確認是否需要進行60Hz專項EMC測試。
